# UICornerCurve.automatic

**Case**

Selects the corner style automatically.

## Declaration

```swift
case automatic
```

## Choosing a corner style

- **UICornerCurve.circular**: Always uses a circular corner style.
- **UICornerCurve.continuous**: Always uses a continuous corner style.

items.description: Always uses a circular corner style.
